category_sources: source_facts.description says Sord is a C library for storing RDF data in memory; official Drobilla docs call it a lightweight RDF model library.
display_name_sources: Official Drobilla project page and API docs use the display name "Sord".
docs_sources: Official API documentation is hosted at drobilla.net/docs/sord/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Drobilla project links and GitLab README identify gitlab.com/drobilla/sord as the project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official Sord API docs identify RDF storage, C library APIs, and command-line tools.
